subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by the wafting of the breezes of Thy mercy in Thy days, and by the surging of the seas of Thy oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بهبوب اریاح رحمتک فی ایامک و بتموج ابحر احدیتک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @prayer for purity; chastity, @prayer for forgiveness, @spiritual transformation
